note: Per-AC FPTP winners snapshot taken from the 41 datasets/elections/<event>/<state>/results.sqlite ground-truth files at the PR-R.2 boundary, immediately before those files are deleted in PR-R.3 (1.8e closure). The canonical-store parity oracle (backend/tests/test_canonical_parity_oracle.py) asserts current dim_candidates + election_results.parquet still produce the same per-AC winners as captured here. Regenerate via tools/snapshot_canonical_parity_oracle_fixture.py ONLY IF the legacy SQLites are restored and a known-good rebuild is in scope; in normal operation this file is immutable.
